evals.prompt: I want to build a Next.js SaaS that auto-generates investor updates from Stripe and product analytics data. Please take this from idea to deployment.
evals.expected_output: Agent triggers full phase workflow, creates persisted project docs, defines measurable MVP and ship plan.

evals.prompt: Build this and ship it fast: an AI tool for freelancers to create proposal drafts. Keep it simple.
evals.expected_output: Skill still runs compressed Discover+Define, avoids immediate coding, and enforces gates + DoD.

evals.prompt: I already have a half-built Next.js app. Help me validate if users actually want this and then launch safely.
evals.expected_output: Skill adapts to existing app context, runs Validate/Ship/Iterate with evidence and risk controls.
